summary: Iteration 7 verification PASS across all 10 review scenarios. Backend pytest 9/9 passes for the three new TMDB endpoints (/api/tmdb/genres/{media}, /api/tmdb/by-genre/{media}/{genre_id}, /api/tmdb/for-you). Frontend Playwright validates: 6-step wizard counter (eyebrow text on steps 1-4), happy path persists scoped viewing-style + autoplay='1' + theme='vesper', skip path persists empty viewing-style + autoplay='0', back-button regression, profile isolation (new profile library is empty), For You shelf renders above networks shelf with 21 tiles and hides when active profile has no preferences.

tests_executed.wizard_step1_eyebrow: PASS - 'Step 1 of 6 · pick a name' in name step
tests_executed.wizard_step2_3_4_eyebrows: PASS - header eyebrow shows 'NEW PROFILE · STEP 2/3/4 OF 6' on avatar/theme/viewing-style
tests_executed.wizard_happy_path_with_vs_and_autoplay_y: PASS - selected genre Action(28), 10 by-genre tiles loaded, picked 2 items, autoplay-prompt → yes, add-password-prompt → no. localStorage: onnowtv-viewing-style-v1:<id> contains movieGenres:[28] and 2 items; onnowtv-autoplay-1080p:<id>='1'; onnowtv-theme:<id>='vesper'
tests_executed.wizard_skip_path: PASS - viewing-style-skip → autoplay-prompt-no → add-password-prompt-no. localStorage shows onnowtv-viewing-style-v1:<id>={movieGenres:[],tvGenres:[],items:[]}, onnowtv-autoplay-1080p:<id>='0'
tests_executed.profile_isolation: PASS - newly created profile's vesper-library:<id> is empty defaults {"favorites":{},"watchLater":[],"dismissed":{}}; no leakage from pre-existing scoped library of prior profile
tests_executed.for_you_visible_with_prefs: PASS - [data-testid=for-you-shelf] rendered above [data-testid=networks-shelf]; 21 tiles in rail; eyebrow 'PICKED FOR YOUR VIEWING STYLE'
tests_executed.for_you_hidden_no_prefs: PASS - for-you-shelf element absent when active profile has empty viewing-style record

critical_code_review_comments: TV keyboard typing speed: at 100 ms/keypress the name display sometimes drops letters for long strings (typed 'IsolationTest' surfaced as 'iontest' on a clean session). Likely a debounce or focus race on the spatial-nav handler in TVKeyboard.jsx. Not a blocker but worth a manual smoke after any name-input refactor.

Legacy `vesper-library` (unscoped) is only promoted to the active profile's scope when `readScopedString` is invoked. If a user creates a brand-new profile and activates it WITHOUT ever using the previous profile's reader path, the legacy key can linger in localStorage. Harmless because the new profile is correctly isolated, but consider a one-time GC of `vesper-library` (legacy) on wizard save to keep storage tidy.

ProfileEdit.jsx is now ~1920 lines (was 1340 last iteration). Splitting ViewingStyleStep, AutoplayPrompt, AvatarStep, NameStep, ThemeStep, and the prompt/modal components into /app/frontend/src/pages/profile-edit/ would improve maintainability — still exceeds the 700-line guideline.
Theme/autoplay/viewing-style persistence is duplicated in both persistAndExit (skip-PIN) and EnterPinModal.onSave (set-PIN). Extract `persistProfilePreferences({pin})` to keep them in lock-step.
seed_data_creation: Used Playwright addInitScript to clear `onnowtv-*` and `vesper-*` localStorage keys before each scenario. For profile-isolation, seeded a fake prior profile 'old-prof' with scoped library + a legacy unscoped vesper-library before creating the IsolationTest profile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend TMDB endpoints live in /app/backend/server.py around lines 1143-1258 and are cached (genres 7d, by-genre 6h, for-you 3h). Frontend wizard 6 steps: name(1) → avatar(2) → theme(3) → viewing-style(4) → autoplay-prompt(5) → add-password-prompt(6→optional enter-pin-modal). Scoped storage keys: onnowtv-viewing-style-v1:<id>, onnowtv-autoplay-1080p:<id>, onnowtv-theme:<id>. ForYouShelf hides when viewing style has both no genres AND no manual items. TV keyboard at high typing-rate can drop chars — slow to 150 ms+ if you need precise name strings.
